concerns.text: Task T020 instructs implementation to use 'log(kloc) as predictor', directly violating Spec FR-004 and SC-002 which mandate 'log(kloc) as an offset'. This is a semantic weakening of the statistical methodology required by the spec.

Task T008 specifies 'shallow clones (--shallow-since=2015-01-01)', which violates Constitution Principle VI requiring 'git clone --depth=1' to extract from the 'full commit log'. A date-based shallow clone may miss authors contributing before 2015, failing the constitutional metric definition.

Task T013 defines 'author_count' as 'unique authors with ≥1 line of code', which conflicts with Constitution Principle VI's requirement to extract authors from the 'full commit log' without filtering by line count. This silently narrows the metric definition.

Task T030 implements 'lagged variable analysis' as a robustness check. While mentioned in the Plan, this is NOT present in Spec FR-007 or User Story 3 acceptance criteria. This introduces a methodological requirement not mandated by the spec, constituting scope creep and potential constraint drift.
